prompt: Make my 'Refill the bird feeders' to-do repeat every Monday.
paraphrases: Turn 'Refill the bird feeders' into a weekly repeating to-do that comes up on Mondays.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Refill the bird feeders' AND rt1_recurrenceRule IS NULL AND rt1_repeatingTemplate IS NULL AND trashed=0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Refill the bird feeders' AND start=2 AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>fu</key><integer>256</integer>%' AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>tp</key><integer>0</integer>%' AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>wd</key><integer>1</integer>%'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask i JOIN TMTask t ON i.rt1_repeatingTemplate=t.uuid WHERE i.title='Refill the bird feeders' AND t.title='Refill the bird feeders' AND i.rt1_recurrenceRule IS NULL AND i.status=0

pseudoScript: things todo make-repeating "$(things search "Refill the bird feeders" --json | jq -r '.data[0].uuid')" --frequency weekly --interval 1 --weekdays monday --dangerously-drive-gui
